profiles.name: fable
profiles.description: Strong direction, taste, and feel for nuance, but can be less thorough than the grinders. Pick it for API design, product design, and nuanced reviews that need judgment and world knowledge; pair it with a thorough worker when completeness matters. Premium-priced and capped at 3 concurrent and 6 calls per run, so spend it on decisions, not fan-out.

profiles.name: sol-max
profiles.description: A diligent genius: always thorough, will not give up, sometimes over-engineers. Use it for complex bugs, hunting vulnerabilities and edge cases, and deep root-cause work where missing something is worse than overdoing it. Capped at 4 concurrent and 8 calls per run.
